svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 12 nodes and 15 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: A1, A2, A3.. Key relationships: A1 points to A2; A2 points to A3; A3 points to A1.. Layout spans 572 by 1103 units with 12 rendered node boxes and 15 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
